closing.headline: Building Angola's Future Through Competent People.
closing.body: ARCO ANGOLA develops the inspectors, technicians, and industry professionals who strengthen quality, safety, integrity, and operational excellence across Angola's Oil & Gas, Energy, Construction, and Industrial sectors.

hero.badge: Angola's First Globally Accredited Industrial Certification Centre
hero.title: Certified Training.
hero.subtitle: International training, competency development and certification solutions — Angola's first globally accredited centre delivering TWI-CSWIP, ASNT, ISO, API and HSE (NEBOSH, IOSH, OSHA) programmes recognised by employers and operators worldwide.

mission.statement: Angola's industrial future depends not only on technology and infrastructure, but on the competence of its people.
mission.body: is committed to developing world-class professionals through Training, Certification, and Technical Competency Development.

ndtOverview.headline: Training that builds
ndtOverview.subtitle: ARCO ANGOLA delivers internationally recognised programmes in ISO management systems, professional certifications, and corporate learning for Angola's industrial workforce.
ndtOverview.localPresence: Local Presence. Global Standards. Committed to Angola.
ndtOverview.promise: Quality. Integrity. Reliability. That's the Arco Angola promise.
ndtOverview.vtDesc: A core technical competence for professional development in quality and safety programmes.
ndtOverview.tmtDesc: Monitoring integrity through accurate thickness data.
ndtOverview.pautDesc: High-resolution imaging of welds and complex geometries.
ndtOverview.tofdDesc: Accurate flaw sizing and location using diffracted signals.
ndtOverview.acfmDesc: Detecting surface-breaking cracks through coatings without removal.
ndtOverview.ectDesc: Surface and near-surface defect detection in conductive materials.
ndtOverview.cmDesc: Ongoing assessment of material degradation and wall loss.
ndtOverview.pmiDesc: Verifying alloy composition to meet specification requirements.

certificates.heading: Our ISO Accreditations
certificates.intro: Arco Angola holds three internationally recognised ISO management system certifications — independently audited and verified, the same standards required by global operators and clients across the energy and industrial sectors.

certHighlights.heading: What We Train
certHighlights.intro: Every programme we deliver is backed by a globally recognised certification body — the same qualifications accepted on worksites and by employers worldwide, now available right here in Angola.
certHighlights.card1Desc: Accredited Lead Auditor programmes for Quality (ISO 9001), Environmental (ISO 14001) and Occupational Health & Safety (ISO 45001) management systems — equipping professionals and organisations for audit, compliance and certification.
certHighlights.card2Desc: ISO 9712 Level 2 and Level 3 certification pathways across major technical methods — conventional techniques, advanced methods (PAUT, TOFD) and specialised courses including ACFM and Eddy Current. A trusted benchmark for professional competence.
certHighlights.card3Desc: ASNT-accredited training pathways covering VT, MT, PT, UT, RT and RTFI — a globally recognised standard for technical qualification in the oil, gas and industrial sectors.
certHighlights.card4Desc: Internationally recognised welding and painting certification pathways from TWI — covering visual welding competence (CSWIP 3.0, 3.1, 3.2) and protective coatings expertise (BGAS Grade 1 & 2).
certHighlights.card5Desc: Comprehensive professional development pathways for the oil & gas and industrial sectors, built to globally recognised standards and designed to prepare professionals for advanced technical roles.
certHighlights.card5bDesc: We partner with corporations, EPC contractors and industrial operators to deliver tailored in-company certification and training programmes. From ISO management system development to workforce capability building, we support certified, audit-ready teams that meet project, tender and regulatory requirements.

hseTraining.heading: Health, Safety & Environmental (HSE) Training
hseTraining.intro: ARCO ANGOLA offers internationally recognized Health, Safety & Environmental (HSE) training programs that help professionals build workplace safety competencies across Oil & Gas, Construction, Manufacturing, Marine, Energy, Infrastructure, and Industrial sectors.
hseTraining.card1Desc: Internationally recognized occupational health and safety training focused on risk management and workplace safety.
hseTraining.card1Program4: NEBOSH HSE Introduction to Incident Investigation
hseTraining.card2Desc: Practical workplace safety training that helps organizations improve safety culture and manage workplace risks effectively.
hseTraining.card2Program4: IOSH Safety for Executives and Directors
hseTraining.card3Desc: OSHA-based workplace safety training covering internationally accepted industrial and construction safety practices.
hseTraining.card4Desc: Preparation program designed for experienced safety professionals pursuing the Certified Safety Professional (CSP) credential.
hseTraining.disclaimer: ARCO ANGOLA provides training, preparation, and competency development programs. Certification examinations and credentials are awarded by the respective certification bodies or their authorized providers, where applicable.

ndtServices.heading: Training &
ndtServices.intro: ARCO ANGOLA delivers internationally recognised training pathways and certification programmes for individuals and organisations across technical and management disciplines.
ndtServices.footerNote: All learning pathways are delivered through recognised training frameworks and accredited certification routes.

about.heading: Who We Are
about.p1: ARCO ANGOLA is a competency-driven training and certification organisation specialising in international professional development, ISO management systems, and workforce capability building for the oil & gas, construction and industrial sectors.
about.p2: We deliver structured learning and certified competence aligned with global industry expectations — the same standards demanded by employers, operators and international project teams worldwide. As Angola's first globally accredited industrial certification centre, we exist to close the gap between local workforce capability and international market expectations.
about.pillar1Desc: Delivering globally recognised programmes in ISO, API, NDT, welding, HSE and professional development disciplines.
about.pillar2Desc: Supporting organisations with workforce upskilling, compliance readiness and in-house learning solutions.
about.pillar3Desc: Helping individuals and teams build the skills, credentials and confidence required to perform at a global level.

whyUs.heading: Why Choose ARCO ANGOLA?
whyUs.subtitle: We serve both individual professionals and corporate clients — delivering internationally recognised certifications and tailored training solutions that meet the real demands of Angola's industrial sector.
whyUs.reason1Desc: Our instructors are active industry professionals with hands-on field experience in oil & gas, construction and industrial operations — bringing real-world expertise, not just classroom theory, to every programme we deliver.
whyUs.reason2Desc: Every certification we deliver is backed by a globally recognised body — TWI-CSWIP, ASNT, API, ISO and HSE (NEBOSH, IOSH, OSHA) — the same qualifications demanded by major operators, contractors and employers on projects worldwide.
whyUs.reason3Desc: Our programmes are built around practical application. Candidates work with real equipment, real scenarios and real technical challenges — building genuine, demonstrable competence that employers can rely on.
whyUs.reason4Desc: For corporates and businesses, our training programmes are developed directly from project requirements and client specifications — producing certified teams that are tender-ready, audit-compliant and operationally effective from day one.
whyUs.reason5Desc: We are here in Angola, delivering internationally accredited programmes locally — with full support in English, Portuguese and French, and deep knowledge of the local industrial landscape and regulatory environment.

individual.title: Advance Your Career
individual.description: Gain internationally recognised credentials that open doors in the global oil, gas, construction and industrial markets.
individual.point2: Increase your salary and market value

corporate.title: Build Compliance and Capacity
corporate.description: Upskill your local workforce, ensure regulatory compliance and strengthen your tender bids with certified teams.
corporate.isoHighlight: The ISO Lead Auditor courses are uniquely structured for both individual professionals upgrading credentials AND businesses requiring organisational compliance.

footer.tagline: Certified Training. Proven Competence. Delivered Excellence.
